summary: Retest of comment notification fix from iteration 2. Fix verified: POST /api/videos/{video_id}/comments now correctly generates a type='comment' notification for the video owner, and correctly suppresses self-comment notifications via create_notification's guard.
passed: Two fresh users signed up via POST /api/auth/signup

GET /api/notifications for u1 returned exactly 1 notification: type='comment', from u2, text contains 'علّق على فيديوك'
GET /api/notifications for u2 returned 0 comment notifications (self-comment did not notify self)
